Docs.param: The ID of the file to download.
The to monitor for cancellation requests.
Docs.summary: Downloads a file and returns its content as a buffered .
Docs.remarks: This method buffers the entire file content into memory. For large files, consider using and streaming directly to the destination.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Threading.Tasks.Task<string> DownloadToAsync (this Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IHostedFileClient client, string fileId, string destinationPath, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public static hidebysig class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<string> DownloadToAsync(class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IHostedFileClient client, string fileId, string destinationPath, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

<Extension()> Public Function DownloadToAsync (client As IHostedFileClient, fileId As String, destinationPath As String, Optional options As HostedFileClientOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of String)

static member DownloadToAsync : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IHostedFileClient * string * string * Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<string>

Docs.param: The ID of the file to download.
The path to save the file to. If the path is a directory or empty, the file name will be inferred. An empty path is treated as the current directory.
The to monitor for cancellation requests.
Docs.summary: Downloads a file and saves it to a local path.
Docs.returns: The actual path where the file was saved.
Docs.exception: A file at the destination path already exists.

Docs.param: The type of object being requested.
An optional key that can be used to help identify the target service.
Docs.summary: Asks the for an object of the specified type and throws an exception if one isn't available.
Docs.remarks: The purpose of this method is to allow for the retrieval of services that are required to be provided by the , including itself or any services it might be wrapping.
Docs.exception: No service of the requested type for the specified key is available.

Docs.exception: No service of the requested type for the specified key is available.
